arts.ttl: Club ‘seriously considering’ move for Chelsea man – Manager a ‘big fan’, Blues unlikely to offer resistance
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are now ‘seriously considering’ signing Carney Chukwuemeka from Chelsa this month. That’s according to journalist Patrick Berger, who reports that Dortmund are looking to strengthen their midfield with a number eight and the Chelsea man is a serious option. arts.ttl: Are there FA Cup third round replays? Competition rules explained for Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: Premier League chief executive Richard Masters concurred, highlighting the concerted effort to boost the FA Cup: "Throughout our discussions, both parties have been committed to enhancing the scheduling of the Emirates FA Cup, a hugely important domestic competition with a storied history. Replays from the first round proper onward have been scrapped following a new scheduling agreement between the FA and the Premier League .

arts.sum: Chelsea are set for another busy transfer window but it very much looks like it’s going to be centred on players leaving, with one £20m...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca's men look to return to form against League Two side plus updates from the other 3pm matches
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Chelsea host League Two side Morecambe at Stamford Bridge in the third round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea vs Morecambe isn't on TV as FA Cup picks explained
arts.sum: Chelsea's clash with Morecambe is one of 32 games taking place this weekend and only 11 of them have been selected for TV coverage across the BBC and ITV. Instead, Chelsea supporters will be able to watch extended highlights of their game against Morecambe on the BBC's round-up show at 10.30pm, or on iPlayer.

arts.ttl: N'Golo Kante shows true colours as Chelsea's Edouard Mendy decision pays off
arts.sum: Last year, he joined Al-Qadsiah in the Saudi Pro League and they are currently fourth in the table. He remains under contract there until 2026 and the 32-year-old has started 10 league games so far this season.

I also like different types of central defenders in Italy, Spain and France but that doesn't mean we are going to buy a player.
